parameters.query: SELECT s.title, s.description, s.hashtags, seo.thumbnail_text, t.topic FROM factory.videos v JOIN factory.scripts s ON s.id = v.script_id JOIN factory.topics t ON t.id = v.topic_id LEFT JOIN factory.seo_outputs seo ON seo.script_id = s.id AND seo.platform = 'youtube' WHERE v.id = $1::uuid

nodes.name: 📤 Publicar via Blotato
nodes.notes:
Blotato publica en YouTube, TikTok, Instagram y Facebook simultáneamente.
Alternativa: usar YouTube Data API v3 directamente.

parameters.query: UPDATE factory.topics SET status = 'completed', produced = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1::uuid
